questions.question: What is the primary goal of the Microsoft AI Transformation Leader program?

options.text: To help organizations implement AI solutions effectively and responsibly.
To provide training on Microsoft Office applications.
To guide organizations in leveraging AI for business transformation.
To develop AI algorithms for Microsoft products.
